productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Grey Knitted Jacket
description: Composition Grey knitted jacket with herringbone pattern made of 80% lambswool and 20% nylon, has full sleeves, a peaked lapel, a buttoned closure with plastic tortoise shell buttons, and two patch pockets on the waist Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash with cold water Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach or wring Dry in shade Warm iron This knitted jacket from united colors of benetton for women is the perfect piece for a lady-like winter look. The herringbone pattern and peaked collar give the jacket an old fashioned charm while the soft knitted fabric and shoulder seam detail keeps it modern. Pair it with form fitting jeans, a fitted tee and ankle high boots. Add a vibrant scarf to splash some colour in your ensemble Model statistics The product is a a size M on a model of height 5'8” and chest 33”
